name: Johnny Mundt
headline: Blocking TE3 in Philadelphia with no passing-game path
body:
Mundt's profile is a blocker who occasionally leaks into a route, and the advanced numbers say exactly that. In 2025 with Jacksonville he ran 156 routes on a 35.8% snap share, drew 19 targets for a 3.5% target share, and turned that into just 9 catches, 111 yards and zero scores at a 47.4% catch rate with three drops. His 0.066 WOPR and 0.71 yards per route run are non-factors, even though his 0.209 EPA per play and the 8.44 yards after catch per reception show he can do damage on the rare touch.

The situation in Philadelphia only narrows the lane further. He landed a one-year deal stuck behind Dallas Goedert, with Grant Calcaterra ahead of him for any pass-catching reps, leaving Mundt to fill two-tight-end sets as an extra blocker. A nine-year veteran with 74 career grabs, he carries no standalone fantasy value. Leave him on the wire unless an injury reshuffles the room.
